generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws hamstring our ability to protect Americans. The 2026 Security Modernization Act gives agencies the tools they need to stop threats before they materialize. Critics who claim this expands government power are missing the point - we're talking about targeted, accountable measures that have worked in allied nations. The alternative is playing catch-up while our adversaries innovate. #NationalSecurityFirst
